overview: GATE Institute of Technology and Sciences (GITS), established in 2008, is a private technical institution located in Kodad, Suryapet district. Managed by the Sai Shirdi Educational Group, the college focuses on delivering quality technical and management education to students in the rural and semi-urban belt of Telangana. It emphasizes skill-based learning and industry readiness through various academic and extracurricular initiatives.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, AI&DS, ECE, EEE, CS&Design, Biotechnology)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + TG EAPCET rank
Graduation in any stream + TG ICET rank
B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / TG PGECET score

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are strictly merit-based following state government norms. 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via state-level web counseling based on entrance exam ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or qualifying marks. Counseling Code: GATE.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET 2026: May 9–11, 2026; TG ICET 2026: May 2026; B.Tech Counseling: July 2026; TG POLYCET: May 2026.

facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
Transport Facility (Fleet covering Kodad and surrounding mandals)
campus.specialNote: The institution is located in a serene, eco-friendly environment at Kattakommagudem village near Kodad. It is known for its discipline and organized academic schedule, often conducting special bridge courses and personality development sessions for its students.

contact.address: Kattakommagudem, Chilkuru Mandal, Kodad, Suryapet District, Telangana - 508206
